Queries.Query:
let ip = '{IPAddress}';
let startTime = ago(7d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= startTime
| where IPAddress == ip
| summarize UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName), Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Users = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 50)
| where UniqueUsers > 5

let ip = '{IPAddress}'; let startTime = ago(3d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= startTime
| where IPAddress == ip
| summarize Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Successes = countif(ResultType == 0)
| where Failures > 10 and Successes > 0

let ip = '{IPAddress}';
let startTime = ago(7d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= startTime
| where IPAddress == ip
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| summarize Countries = make_set(Country), CountryCount = dcount(Country)

let ip = '{IPAddress}';
let startTime = ago(7d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= startTime
| where IPAddress == ip
| where AppDisplayName in ('Azure Portal','Microsoft Admin Center','Microsoft Azure Management')
| summarize Attempts = count()

let ip = '{IPAddress}';
SigninLogs
| where IPAddress == ip
| join kind=inner (AADRiskyUsers) on UserPrincipalName
| project UserPrincipalName, RiskLevel, RiskState

let ip = '{IPAddress}';
let startTime = ago(7d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= startTime
| where IPAddress == ip
| extend OS = tostring(DeviceDetail.operatingSystem), Browser = tostring(DeviceDetail.browser)
| summarize OSSet = make_set(OS), BrowserSet = make_set(Browser)

let ip = '{IPAddress}';
let startTime = ago(7d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= startTime
| where IPAddress == ip
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, ResultType, Location = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
let baseline = SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d)..ago(2d))
| extend DeviceId = tostring(DeviceDetail.deviceId)
| summarize by DeviceId;
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(48h)
| extend DeviceId = tostring(DeviceDetail.deviceId)
| where DeviceId !in (baseline)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceId, IPAddress, LocationDetails, AppDisplayName

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailedAttempts=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated)
| extend PossiblePasswordSpray = DistinctIPs > 5

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| summarize
    MFAEvents=countif(AuthenticationMethodsUsed has 'mfa'),
    NonMFAEvents=countif(AuthenticationMethodsUsed !has 'mfa')

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where IncomingTokenType == 'primaryRefreshToken'
| summarize TokenUse=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), DistinctDevices=dcount(tostring(DeviceDetail.deviceId))

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where CrossTenantAccessType != 'none'
| project TimeGenerated, CrossTenantAccessType, ResourceTenantId, IPAddress

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| summarize Count=count(), DistinctApps=dcount(AppDisplayName), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress)

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
AADRiskyUsers
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| project TimeGenerated, RiskLevel, RiskState, RiskDetail

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where AppDisplayName in ('Azure Portal','Microsoft Admin Center','Microsoft Azure Management')
| project TimeGenerated, AppDisplayName, IPAddress, LocationDetails

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
AuditLogs
| where TargetResources has userUPN
| where OperationName contains 'Add' or OperationName contains 'role'
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy, TargetResources

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| project TimeGenerated, Country, IPAddress
| order by TimeGenerated asc

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| project TimeGenerated, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, ResultType, DeviceDetail
| order by TimeGenerated asc

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where isnotempty(UniqueTokenIdentifier)
| summarize DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), DistinctDevices=dcount(tostring(DeviceDetail.deviceId)), Events=count() by UniqueTokenIdentifier
| where DistinctIPs > 1 or DistinctDevices > 1
| project UniqueTokenIdentifier, Events, DistinctIPs, DistinctDevices

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where ConditionalAccessStatus in ('notApplied','failure')
| project TimeGenerated, AppDisplayName, IPAddress, ConditionalAccessStatus, LocationDetails

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
AuditLogs
| where OperationName has 'authentication' or OperationName has 'MFA'
| where TargetResources has userUPN
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy, TargetResources

AuditLogs
| where OperationName contains 'service principal'
| where OperationName contains 'credential' or OperationName contains 'secret'
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy, TargetResources

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
AzureActivity
| where Caller contains userUPN
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceProviderValue, CallerIpAddress

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| where IsRisky == true or RiskLevelAggregated in ("high","medium")
| project TimeGenerated, RiskLevelAggregated, RiskDetail, IPAddress, AppDisplayName

let userUPN = '{UserPrincipalName}';
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == userUPN
| summarize SignInCount=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), DistinctApps=dcount(AppDisplayName)
| extend Suspicious = DistinctIPs > 5 or DistinctApps > 10

AuditLogs
| where OperationName contains 'consent'
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy, TargetResources
